author: jonnydeates
description: Pull stories, bugs, chores from Pivotal Tracker.

manifest.author: Jon Deates
manifest.description: This is an unofficial pivotal tracker integration plugin for Obsidian. This plugin allows the user to pull stories, chores, bugs from their pivotal counterpart.
manifest.name: Pivotal Tracker Integration

name: Pivotal Tracker Integration

releases.author: JonnyDeates
releases.description:
Minor Change to the tagging system, using actual tags now.
- #pivotal-tracker
- #chore 
- #bug
- #story

releases.author: JonnyDeates
releases.description: Dropped the plugin from the manifest.json and the package, to be more in line with what the obsidian plugins repo wants.

releases.author: JonnyDeates
releases.description: Removed the obsidian tag from the manifest id, and the package.json
releases.name: V1.0.4

releases.author: JonnyDeates
releases.description:
**Fixed**
- The file path setting had an error where if it existed it would dump it to the top level.

releases.author: JonnyDeates
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JonnyDeates/obsidian-pivotal-tracker-integration-plugin/compare/1.0.0...1.0.2

**Additions**
- Updated command to pull stories
- Added Notifications for the action of pulling stories
- Added Error state notifications
- Added the ability for the story folder path to automatically get generated.

Fixed
- The generation if there is no folder there.

releases.author: JonnyDeates
releases.description: This is the initial release of the pivotal tracker plugin for obsidian.
